negative_variants.description: Latched Bus DAC8: forces the output to zero instead of decoding the latched bus.
Latched Bus DAC8: updates from the input bus continuously, so it fails hold-between-clock-edge behavior.
Latched Bus DAC8: samples on falling clock edges instead of rising update edges.
Latched Bus DAC8: treats b0 as the MSB and b7 as the LSB.
Latched Bus DAC8: uses a 7-bit full-scale span for an 8-bit code, so the decoded output gain and endpoint mapping are wrong.
